overall.description: First-person walking tour through a sunny urban environment resembling Los Santos from GTA V. The camera moves along sidewalks past commercial buildings, palm trees, and occasional pedestrians, transitioning from a corner auto shop area to a view of the downtown skyline.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a sidewalk bordered by a white wall with red 'Mosley Auto Service' lettering. Two pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction, and the camera passes blue and green dumpsters as it approaches the street corner.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a wider street with an open view of downtown skyscrapers in the distance. Low-rise apartment buildings line the right side behind a metal fence.

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the sidewalk past the All Buy store with its large glass windows. The downtown skyscrapers remain visible to the left as the camera approaches a traffic light at the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined commercial street corner into an expansive urban vista featuring a distant city skyline. It begins by walking along a sunny concrete sidewalk past a white building with red trim, a traffic light, and parked cars. As the camera proceeds, the view is bordered by a white wall featuring Mosley Auto Service lettering, passing pedestrians and colorful dumpsters before reaching the edge of the block. The scene then opens up as the camera turns right, shifting from the enclosed sidewalk to a wider street where low-rise apartments and metal fences give way to a clear view of downtown skyscrapers. Finally, the movement continues past the large glass windows of an All Buy store, keeping the distant skyline in sight while approaching a traffic light at the next intersection.
